pairs.py:
def product_reachable(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Multiply the values of all nodes reachable from start."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; p = 1
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); p *= vals[n]
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return p

def sum_even(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the values of reachable nodes whose value is even."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        acc += v if v % 2 == 0 else 0
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

def max_chain(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the maximum value in the chain (0 if empty)."""
    items = spec["items"]
    return max(items) if items else 0

def total_label_length(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the character counts of every word along the chain."""
    words = spec["words"]
    total = 0
    for wd in words:
        total += len(wd)
    return total

def category_names(spec: dict) -> list:
    """Sorted names of the categories fanned out under root."""
    names = list(spec["categories"].keys())
    names.sort()
    return names
